title: The Open Sauce Toast Killer
description: Removes those annoying pop-ups you see in-game
body:
### What is this A quick mixin mod that removes EVERY toast in the game, including but not limited to: - The annoying "tutorial" toasts - Recipe unlock toasts - "Messages can't be verified" on servers with `enforce-secure-profile` off. ### Why does this exist? [Methane](https://modrinth.com/mod/methane) from 2.3 onwards has an almost identical toast remover, but since it also has features most people don't want, I decided to release this standalone. Another thing is that all the other "toast removal" mods on modrinth don't seem to be maintained, so this is a more "modern" alternative. The "main goal" for this mod is to **always support the latest MC versions,** and has been designed in such a way. **normally this mod will work on later versions of MC than what is listed.** Also has a neat performance boost because all the logic for presenting and rendering toasts is pretty slow (albeit infrequent after you progress into the late game.) ### How about 🅱orge!??! **The Forge port** will be released when Half-Life 3 has released. (there's a chance!) Any issues should be reported on github.
Note for Korean players ### ENG

This mod will inadvertently disable the playtime warnings imposed when playing in Korea, this may require you to have a disclaimer for players, or to maintain a "korea edition" without this mod.

### [KR \(Translation\)](https://github.com/AnOpenSauceDev/Toast-Killer/issues/4)

이 모드는 한국에서 플레이할 시 게임 과몰입 주의문구를 비활성화시킵니다. 이와 관련하여 플레이어에게 경고하거나, 이 모드를 포함하지 않는 한국인 에디션을 만들어야 할 수 있습니다.

This is not legal advice.
